make a hardware keychain,
get a custom lanyard and charm

get your lanyard!

you could make...

your pendant should be decorative, and easy to carry around, and able to be attached to a keychain!

ready to start?

  1. make a PCB
  2. design the case
  3. ship your project
  4. get your prizes!(designs wip)

faq

can i participate?

anybody 18 years old or younger can particpate!

when does pendant start and end?

pendant runs from June 17, 2026, to June 23(?), 2026.

i have more questions!

you can contact @bunnyguy on slack (help channel soon)

made with sleep deprivation by Nick
